phrases.intent_en: Buy two adult tickets and one child ticket for the space park
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais deux billets adultes et un billet enfant pour la Cité de l'Espace, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY duh bee-YAY ah-DYLT ay un bee-YAY ahn-FAHN poor lah see-TAY duh les-PASS seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Toulouse is Europe's aerospace capital; Airbus, the Ariane rocket programme, and CNES (France's space agency) are all based here.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the next planetarium show starts
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence la prochaine séance au planétarium ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur koh-MAHNS lah proh-SHEN say-AHNS oh plah-nay-TAH-ryum
phrases.cultural_note: The Cité de l'Espace has two full-dome planetarium theatres offering shows on astronomy and space exploration.

responses.english: The next show is in thirty minutes.
responses.phonetic: lah proh-SHEN say-AHNSS eh dahn TRAHNT mee-NOOT
responses.french: La prochaine séance est dans trente minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the full-scale Ariane 5 rocket replica is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la réplique grandeur nature de la fusée Ariane 5 ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah ray-PLEEK grahn-DUR nah-TYOOR duh lah fyoo-ZAY ah-RYAH-nuh SANK
phrases.cultural_note: The Cité de l'Espace features a full-scale model of the Ariane 5 rocket standing outdoors — a major photo opportunity.

responses.english: Outside, in the park, you cannot miss it.
responses.phonetic: duh-OR dahn luh PARK voo nuh poo-VAY pah lah mahn-KAY
responses.french: Dehors, dans le parc, vous ne pouvez pas la manquer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the ISS module walkthrough is included in the entry ticket
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la visite du module ISS est incluse dans le billet d'entrée ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lah vee-ZEET doo moh-DYOOL ee-ES-ESS eh an-KLYOZ dahn luh bee-YAY dahn-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Cité de l'Espace has a replica section of the International Space Station where visitors can experience the cramped living conditions.

responses.english: Yes, it is included in the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee say tahn-KLOO dahn luh bee-YAY
responses.french: Oui, c'est inclus dans le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a staff member to explain how a rocket engine works
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous m'expliquer comment fonctionne un moteur de fusée ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo mex-plee-KAY koh-MAHN fonk-SYON un moh-TUR duh fyoo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Staff at Cité de l'Espace are well trained in science communication and happy to explain aerospace concepts to all ages.

responses.english: There are explanatory panels at each stage.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day pah-NOH ex-plee-kah-TEEF ah SHAHK ay-TAP
responses.french: Il y a des panneaux explicatifs à chaque étape.
